classification_rationale: V10 introduces 36 new schemas and skills across autonomous intelligence, decision support, discovery depth, prototype generation, marketing content, stakeholder management, and a living system — transforming ProductOS from a structured artifact engine into a world-class PM superpower platform.
summary: ProductOS V10.0.0 is the stable release for the PM superpower platform, autonomous intelligence, decision intelligence, prototype generation, marketing content, and the living Product Health Dashboard.
breaking_changes: Skill system upgraded from 7-element V9 format to 12-element V10 format
upgrade_actions: Adopt new V10 schemas in workspace artifact generation pipelines
Run autonomous full-lifecycle discovery-to-launch with `./productos run full-lifecycle`
Use Product Health Dashboard as single source of product truth
Configure competitive radar with competitor surfaces for continuous monitoring
Review autonomous review gate thresholds per maturity band
